title: Senior Business Development Manager at RMZ Corp International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Senior Business Development Manager at RMZ Corp International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
We at RMZ Corp International Enterprises are looking for an experienced Business Development Manager based out of Coimbatore. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About RMZ Corp International Enterprises:
RMZ Corp International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in GIS Tools

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RMZ Corp International Enterprises!
